summary: Tested iteration 199: Advice Copilot LLM (GPT-5.2), execution tickets, Resend-mock notify, market snapshot, compliance trail with Mongo persistence. 18/18 backend tests passed. Frontend Generate Advice → AdviceDraftModal → edit/save/regenerate/approve flow fully functional. LLM produced 2502-char compliant draft, regenerated to 1487 chars on instruction. Apply Strategy + Notify Client buttons fire backend calls and show toasts. Compliance Trail, Market Pulse HUD, trail-list visible on Client Decision Hub. 12 compliance-audit beacons emitted during one session.

integration_issues.issue: On /client-360 mount, no GET /api/market-feed/snapshot calls were observed within ~10s of mount during the test window (HUD displays default +0.00%). Endpoint itself works (200 OK with simulated XJO/XAO/AUDUSD payload). Likely startMarketFeed in /app/frontend/src/engine/readinessCache.js is not firing on ClientDecisionHub mount, OR the first poll is delayed beyond the test wait. Recommend verifying the polling timer trigger and initial fetch.

action_items: Investigate why /api/market-feed/snapshot is not being called on ClientDecisionHub mount within the first 10s — check startMarketFeed wiring in readinessCache.js and confirm initial-fetch on mount (not only interval). Backend endpoint is healthy.
critical_code_review_comments: compliance_audit.py is ~1090 lines and mixes legacy in-memory KYC/AML/Approvals seeded data with new Mongo-backed readiness_events + adviser_actions collections — recommend splitting into compliance_audit_legacy.py (in-memory) and compliance_audit_persistent.py to reduce coupling and ease future migration of the legacy parts to Mongo.

advice_copilot.py: regenerate endpoint preserves session_id which is good for context continuity, but no max-version cap — over many regenerations, history list could grow unbounded. Consider adding a soft cap or summarisation.
notify_client.py: when RESEND fails (mode='error'), still returns success=True. Suggest returning success=False with error in payload so frontend can surface it distinctly from 'mocked'.
execution_tickets.py: status field accepts arbitrary strings via PATCH. Consider Pydantic Enum validation matching the documented lifecycle (pending/executing/completed/failed/cancelled).
test_credentials: No auth required. localStorage: wealth_command_compliance_v5='permanent', app_mode='adviser'. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in backend/.env (live LLM verified).
seed_data_creation: Created via tests: 2 advice_drafts (chen approved, thompson rejected), 1 execution_tickets (chen rebalance executing), 1 client_notifications (chen mocked), 1+ readiness_events (chen), 2+ adviser_actions (chen generate, plus UI-emitted ones).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All advice copilot LLM endpoints verified end-to-end including 409 lock semantics on amend/regenerate after approval. UI modal flow works including loader, edit body, save amend, regenerate with instruction (amend prompt clears), approve closes modal. Apply Strategy & Notify Client fire correctly with mocked-mode toast. Only outstanding question is whether market-feed polling fires on CDH mount; backend snapshot endpoint itself returns valid simulated payload with XJO/XAO/AUDUSD and avg_delta_pct.
rca of the issue: Market-feed snapshot endpoint OK at backend level; no client request observed during 10s window after CDH mount. Possible causes: (a) startMarketFeed only sets up an interval >10s without an immediate fetch, (b) hook not invoked on CDH path, (c) cached value in readinessCache prevents re-fetch. Recommend logging inside startMarketFeed and confirming the first call timing.
